goal: Deprecate gad startup in favor of gad snapshot --create-session. First call of the day auto-creates a session record if none exists. Keep startup as a documented alias for one release, then remove. Decision 2026-04-20 D6.
resolution: Shipped in M4 sweep 2026-04-20. See .planning/notes/2026-04-20-multi-agent-architecture-decisions.md and .planning/notes/2026-04-20-roadmap-requirements-audit.md.
